progress.verification: 4 deterministic tests passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-equivalent committed logic
progress.protected_invariant: Wrangler, workflow deployment, control-plane metadata verification, and proof construction must refer to the same canonical Cloudflare Pages project.

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values before the workflow can prove project existence, deploy, return an immutable deployment URL, and verify served identity.
next_action: Wire the project identity validator into the workflow test stage, then dispatch the workflow after environment credentials are configured. Accept C-001 only after the returned deployment URL resolves, serves the committed research identity, and is bound to the exact source commit by the existing proof and attestation chain.
shared_state_policy: No canonical queue item or other team's record was overwritten.
deletion_policy: No files or Git history were deleted.
